title: Rail freight is Europe’s industrial backbone. It only works as one system. [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Rail freight is central to Europe's competitiveness, resilience and climate goals. Yet fragmentation in safety and liability rules is undermining the very system that makes it work. Stronger European coordination and collective approaches to risk are needed to keep rail freight ready to power Europe's industrial future.
